branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Causal-wave / chirality-running carrier; spans the chirality flip

description: Five measured causal-wave transport coefficients of the carrier C(tau). Determined by bounded-operator readout on the underlying lattice; not fitted to downstream observables.
transport_equation: dC/dtau = D(Omega) * Laplacian(C) - gamma * C + alpha_xi * C + beta_pi * Pi_common * C + eps_sync2 * C

alpha_xi.role: Xi reaction rate (correlation buildup through Xi)

D_Omega.role: Effective diffusion on the Omega shell

gamma.role: Damping / dissipation rate (source of the time arrow)

G_NET.role: Net transport gain per unit tau (central kinematic quantity)

N_gen.role: Number of fermion generations (used in dimensional landings)
